summary: Classified role-mainline parity issues and judged contract-carrying + frontend-consumption as root causes, while business fact and permission are not primary causes in sampled evidence.
risks: Action-open contract carrying still misses stable view_mode semantics.
Search/group interaction binding on custom list side is not equivalent to native behavior.
next_step: Open implementation batch: P0 contract carrying completion, P1 frontend interaction binding parity, then P2 role-mainline end-of-stage full verification.
